emails.subject: FW: West pricing information
emails.body: FW: West pricing information I sent this message to colin originally and, since he's out, I am forwarding it to you. I'm not really sure who the appropriate person is. I also just realized that I forgot to include the attachment on the original message oops. Anyway, could you take a look at this sheet and let me know what you could come up with? I'd like to build something that looks like the "price sheet" tab. Thanks. To: Tonks, Colin

emails.subject: RE: West pricing information
emails.body: ok great sounds good let me know if you need any more information

emails.subject: RE: West pricing information
emails.body: RE: West pricing information Tori, I just wanted to let you know that we haven't forgotten about you. Kim Alexander who has really been the authority on the pricing information was involved in an auto accident this previous Sunday. He'll be returning to work next Wednesday and would be able to complete this much faster than anyone else trying to pick it up. I'll keep you informed next week as to how it goes. Thanks for your patience, Dave

emails.subject: RE: West pricing information
emails.body: david where are we on this? is there any hope of getting this done?
